exploration_notes: The CharField max_length validation spans five files: (1) django/db/models/fields/__init__.py contains the model CharField which validates max_length is a positive integer via _check_max_length_attribute() and adds MaxLengthValidator to enforce the length constraint at the field level. (2) django/core/validators.py defines MaxLengthValidator, the shared validator used by both model and form CharField.
